_comment: VIDTOOLZ media generation routing policy. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for which machine/engine owns each generation responsibility. This is hard policy, not a preference: local lanes must NEVER silently fall back to another host or to a cloud/external service. If a required local service is unavailable, the system must surface a clear blocked state and preserve the operator decision point. External (GPT/KlingAI) media is MANUAL ONLY — copy prompts out, import media back; never automated. Endpoints are overridable via the listed env vars so the policy can follow the real LAN without code edits.

image_prompt_generation.label: Image prompts
image_prompt_generation.operator_text: Image prompts: local Ollama on vidnux

text_to_image_generation.label: Images
text_to_image_generation.operator_text: Image generation: local ComfyUI/FLUX on vidnux

i2v_prompt_generation.label: I2V prompts
i2v_prompt_generation.operator_text: I2V prompts: local Ollama on PRESTO

image_to_video_generation.label: Videos
image_to_video_generation.operator_text: Video generation: local ComfyUI/Wan2.2 on PRESTO

manual_external_image_generation.label: External images (manual)
manual_external_image_generation.operator_text: External images: copy prompt to GPT in the browser; import the saved files back

manual_external_i2v_generation.label: External videos (manual)
manual_external_i2v_generation.operator_text: External videos: copy I2V prompt + upload image to KlingAI in the browser; import the saved files back

operator_summary: Image prompts: local Ollama on vidnux
Image generation: local ComfyUI on vidnux
I2V prompts: local Ollama on PRESTO
Video generation: local ComfyUI on PRESTO
External media: manual browser workflow only; import after generation
